query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO kc_library (kc_id, name, domain, jurisdiction, category, authority_type, authority_cite, authority_notes, tags) VALUES
('CIV_CA_HABITABILITY_1941_1', 'Habitability / Untenantable Conditions', 'civil', 'CA', 'Tenant Rights', 'statute', 'Cal. Civ. Code § 1941.1', 'Minimum habitability standards.', 'tenant,housing'),
('CIV_CA_RENT_DEMAND_1942_4', 'Rent Demand/Collection Bar During Serious Code Violations', 'civil', 'CA', 'Tenant Rights', 'statute', 'Cal. Civ. Code § 1942.4', 'Ties to substandard conditions + notices.', 'tenant,housing'),
('CIV_CA_FEHA_12940', 'FEHA Discrimination / Harassment / Retaliation (umbrella)', 'civil', 'CA', 'Employment', 'statute', 'Cal. Gov. Code § 12940', 'Use sub-tags for discrimination/harassment/retaliation.', 'employment,feha'),
('CIV_CA_WHISTLEBLOWER_1102_5', 'Whistleblower Retaliation', 'civil', 'CA', 'Employment', 'statute', 'Cal. Lab. Code § 1102.5', 'Reporting violations to government or internal compliance.', 'employment,retaliation'),
('CIV_CA_OVERTIME_510', 'Overtime Violations', 'civil', 'CA', 'Employment / Wage & Hour', 'statute', 'Cal. Lab. Code § 510', 'OT rules depend on facts/exemptions.', 'wage-hour'),
('CIV_CA_WAGE_STATEMENT_226', 'Wage Statement Violations', 'civil', 'CA', 'Employment / Wage & Hour', 'statute', 'Cal. Lab. Code § 226', 'Itemized wage statement requirements.', 'wage-hour'),
('CIV_CA_MEAL_REST_226_7', 'Meal/Rest/Recovery Premium Violations', 'civil', 'CA', 'Employment / Wage & Hour', 'statute', 'Cal. Lab. Code § 226.7', 'Premium pay for missed breaks.', 'wage-hour'),
('CIV_CA_UNPAID_WAGES_1194', 'Unpaid Minimum Wage / Overtime (Civil Action; fees/costs)', 'civil', 'CA', 'Employment / Wage & Hour', 'statute', 'Cal. Lab. Code § 1194', 'Common wage suit anchor.', 'wage-hour');
